productDisplayName: Puma Men Bts Navy Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Navy blue t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, round neck and graphic print of a white patch from the left sleeve to the right shoulder blade and puma Leaping cat on right chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Warm up and enjoy healthy sporting in style with this puma t-shirt. Made of pure cotton fabric, you are sure to stay fresh and comfortable in it all day long, while the stylish white patch running across the chest from the left waist and sleeve to the right shoulder blade enhances your style quotient. Team this with sportswear when on a fitness drive, and with jeans and sandals for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulders-18"
